scripts.test:store: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/session-store.test.ts tests/session-startup-hydration.test.ts tests/thread-titles.test.ts tests/sidebar-groups.test.ts tests/thread-export.test.ts tests/preview-runtime-keys.test.ts
scripts.test:assistant-stream: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/assistant-stream-grouping.test.ts tests/assistant-stream-summary.test.ts tests/preview-activity.test.ts tests/turn-events.test.ts tests/turn-queue.test.ts tests/turn-prompt.test.ts tests/turn-runtime.test.ts tests/turn-stream.test.ts
scripts.test:ui-preferences: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/ui-preferences-store.test.ts tests/shortcuts.test.ts tests/chat-search.test.ts tests/context-menu.test.ts
scripts.test:git-refresh: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/git-refresh.test.ts tests/git-diff-renderer.test.ts tests/git-commit-message-models.test.ts tests/turn-workspace.test.ts
scripts.test:artifacts: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/artifacts.test.ts tests/preview-panel-rendering.test.tsx && node tests/run-tauri-rust-test.mjs artifact_
scripts.verify:release: npm run package:release && npm run release:portable && npm run release:manifest && npm run verify:release-manifest && npm run verify:release-launch
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:copy && npm run test:brand-cleanup && npm run test:selectors && npm run test:store && npm run test:settings && npm run test:assistant-stream && npm run test:context-compaction && npm run test:reasoning && npm run test:ui-preferences && npm run test:onboarding && npm run test:user-state-storage && npm run test:update && npm run test:api-models && npm run test:git-refresh && npm run test:media && npm run test:mobile-companion && npm run test:artifacts && npm run verify:release-workflow && npm run test:tauri-config
scripts.verify:tauri-webview: npm run verify:tauri && npm run test:tauri-webview
scripts.verify:tester-ready: npm run verify && npm run verify:release && npm run verify:tauri-webview
